title: Weekly Calendar View on Mobile
excerpt: Currently only the monthly view is available on mobile on the calendar view for a board.  Can the week and day views be incorporated into the Calendar view on mobile?  For weekly schedule tracking of appts for items on a…

posts.author: Wallabyjax (Brock Stefura )
posts.cookedHtml: Currently only the monthly view is available on mobile on the calendar view for a board. Can the week and day views be incorporated into the Calendar view on mobile? For weekly schedule tracking of appts for items on a board, this would be much easier and is part of a normal workflow. Thank you!
